Spec Malformed Row

10. Modules

Modules section has one valid row and one malformed (2-td) row that the parser should skip with a warning.

namedepsrole
foo (none) Owns the canonical pipeline orchestration for the tracer slice.
broken only-two-cells

11. Architectural assertions

Assertions exist.

  • Module foo must not import from bar — the orchestration boundary is unidirectional and importing the downstream sibling would introduce a cycle.
Source: tracer fixture
